Environment Variables (Debug)

// __env.js - Auto-generated configuration
window._env_ = {
    API_URL: "https://api.internal.example.com/v1",
    AUTH_TOKEN: "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9...",
    DATABASE_URL: "postgres://user:pass@db.internal:5432/app",
    FEATURE_FLAGS: {
        new_ui: true,
        beta_features: false
    },
    DEBUG: true
};

This file is intended for internal use only.
